{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211333476765DD32958155B8F743"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579782249437905689","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"环境描写、人性变化展示人物内心世界情感"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764809342,"group_id":"7574730365441412121","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NycX9PqEdw8rcL8cp4lVj9U=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614448&x-signature=77B3F2V9HxLK4vsnQuBSstH5PAo%3D","user_id":"92822259883","user_name":"小院晒太阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92822259883","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574730365441412121","book_info":{"abstract":"我穿越成了大清皇宫里最尴尬的皇子——身上流着被爱新觉罗家灭族的叶赫那拉之血。本想藏拙保命，却在奉命把守三官庙的那一夜，听到了里面大明督师洪承畴的哽咽，和庄妃大玉儿那与其说是劝降，不如说是……诱惑的低语。
门开，她发髻微乱走出来，与满身是血、刚处理完刺客的我四目相对。
我单膝跪地，声音平静无波：“奴才什么都没听见，什么都没看见。”
她俯身，在我耳边留下带着温热香气的轻语：“你是个聪明人。从今天起，你就是本宫在皇上身边，最隐秘的那把刀。”
我知道，我攥住了这个未来孝庄太后（昭圣皇太后）最要命的把柄，也踏上了最危险的权力钢丝。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9168e27e77b3ec90e482ca01c3e0f092~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"南瓜地里追月光的猹","author_id":"","book_id":"7574730365441412121","book_name":"清宫秘史：开局我手握庄妃把柄","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1945人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":502,"name":"宫廷侯爵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=502&name=宫廷侯爵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574767542745448985","read_count":"1945","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"801923"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"270","tags":"历史古代,历史,清朝,宫廷侯爵,魂穿,开局,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9168e27e77b3ec90e482ca01c3e0f092~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255228&x-signature=n7XeeFbtNDw%2FNrHnGmmnlsjQ9jM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1099102211289543","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211333
